item.title: Deviousness Day 146
item.description:
alright I disappeared there a moment cause was sick and irl is chaos. Doing these way late and also better late then never. hope yall are having a good friday!
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent cause irl always comes first. I do randomly show up in vc and game. @PyroDragon does also hang out in the vc and game too. if you havnt met Pyro. They are fun. We have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2, We Need To Go Deeper, and current obsession is om?! Random games go on sale on steam and I am like. I wanna play! All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness *some people have mentioned that the link isnt working. things to try: make sure to have a birthdate on your discord account since it is age restricted by discord and it works better to join on pc cause phone can be glitchy; plus ios users have to opt into seeing age restricted servers on desktop* other link that might work better? https://discord.com/invite/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Dumpage
item.dc:creator: supastebbilicious

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
alright I disappeared there a moment cause was sick and irl is chaos. Doing these way late and also better late then never. hope yall are having a good friday!
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent cause irl always comes first. I do randomly show up in vc and game. @PyroDragon does also hang out in the vc and game too. if you havnt met Pyro. They are fun. We have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2, We Need To Go Deeper, and current obsession is om?! Random games go on sale on steam and I am like. I wanna play! All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness *some people have mentioned that the link isnt working. things to try: make sure to have a birthdate on your discord account since it is age restricted by discord and it works better to join on pc cause phone can be glitchy; plus ios users have to opt into seeing age restricted servers on desktop* other link that might work better? https://discord.com/invite/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "Our full potential is on the other side of fear." "Without trust, any relationship is bound to fail." -These are from the Skywalkers documentary I watched the other night. I liked em. I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Saturday Meme Dump of Memes #212
item.description:
1
2
3
4. Inspection Time!
5
6
7. Me in the winter be like
8
9
10. Yet another video confirming that cats love to push shit
11
12. Her face...
13
14. Rally car crashes while the pilot and his navigator calmly wait for the car to stop crashing...
15. If you made it to end of this dump, I think this book would be perfect for you! P.S. Hey Imgur friendos, I hope you enjoyed this dump. I want to share with you that when I'm not making questionable posts on Imgur, I'm actually working on a game inspired by The Snaley Parable. I love that game, and really wanted more games like this, so I decided to make one. It's gonna take almost 2 years, but I'm getting there. By wishlisting, you’ll be supporting important scientific research into whether absurdity has any limits (spoiler: it doesn’t). Think of it as the existential crisis you didn't know you needed, wrapped in a wacky, fourth-wall-breaking package. Your future self is already thanking you... or possibly blaming you. Steam page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.dc:creator: Timpani

item.title: How US citizens perceive their own population: A nation made of gay black millionaires.
item.description: The average US citizen estimates that Every fifth US citizen is transgender. Every fourth US household has an income of over 500,000$. Every third US citizen is gay or lesbian. Every second US citizen is either muslimic or jewish. Nearly half of the US population is black. Every third adult US citizen is unionized. One in three adult US citizens has finished high school. This has the fingerprints of a massive structural media bias combined with a poor education system all over it, though the study delivers a different explanation. I think it would be quite difficult for a population this disinformed making grounded democratic decisions. Source: https://today.yougov.com/politics/articles/41556-americans-misestimate-small-subgroups-population "When people’s average perceptions of group sizes are compared to actual population estimates, an intriguing pattern emerges: Americans tend to vastly overestimate the size of minority groups. This holds for sexual minorities, including the proportion of gays and lesbians (estimate: 30%, true: 3%), bisexuals (estimate: 29%, true: 4%), and people who are transgender (estimate: 21%, true: 0.6%). It also applies to religious minorities, such as Muslim Americans (estimate: 27%, true: 1%) and Jewish Americans (estimate: 30%, true: 2%). And we find the same sorts of overestimates for racial and ethnic minorities, such as Native Americans (estimate: 27%, true: 1%), Asian Americans (estimate: 29%, true: 6%), and Black Americans (estimate: 41%, true: 12%)." The study's explanation: "Why is demographic math so difficult? One recent meta-study suggests that when people are asked to make an estimation they are uncertain about, such as the size of a population, they tend to rescale their perceptions in a rational manner. When a person’s lived experience suggests an extreme value — such as a small proportion of people who are Jewish or a large proportion of people who are Christian — they often assume, reasonably, that their experiences are biased. In response, they adjust their prior estimate of a group’s size accordingly by shifting it closer to what they perceive to be the mean group size (that is, 50%). This can facilitate misestimation in surveys, such as ours, which don’t require people to make tradeoffs by constraining the sum of group proportions within a certain category to 100%. This reasoning process — referred to as uncertainty-based rescaling — leads people to systematically overestimate the size of small values and underestimate the size of large values. It also explains why estimates of populations closer to 0% (e.g., LGBT people, Muslims, and Native Americans) and populations closer to 100% (e.g., adults with a high school degree or who own a car) are less accurate than estimates of populations that are closer to 50%, such as the percentage of American adults who are married or have a child."
item.dc:creator: Mehlbox

item.title: Images of Note: Birthday memes
item.description:
CARL, IS THAT A WEED?
I hate snow more than I hate most people
old forest spirits
YOU CANNOT PET THE DOG!
THE JOE WAS FAR TOO SLOPPY!
Boobs even
imagine taking the easiest way for companies to get information out to people and do Public relations and ruining it to the point it to the point said companies flee to BlueSky.
I fucking love that.
OH NO! WHY?!
me turning on the news
mood
HELL YEAH
TRANS WRONG!
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky It is officially by birthday! Yay! And it snowed! Boo!
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
